name: 17q24_q25_NPLOC4_SD
description: 17q24-q25 subtelomeric SD blocks around NPLOC4, FASN and OGFOD3. Direct-orientation duplicons of ~20-40 kb at ~96% identity associated with rare 17q24-q25 microdeletions and subtelomeric rearrangements.

architecture.internal_structure: Subtelomeric SD modules including NPLOC4 paralogs and OGFOD3 duplicons; mixed direct and inverted orientations; partly overlap 17qter cap of T2T-CHM13.
